canonical_definition: An evaluation procedure used as a baseline where the model's generated code is executed, and the model is iteratively asked to refine the code based on the execution outcomes (errors or incorrect outputs).
papers: ScienceAgentBench: Toward Rigorous Assessment of Language Agents for Data-Driven Scientific Discovery
